attributes.name: label
attributes.description: This property is used to generate a proper `aria-label`. It will be announced by screen reader as: "<<this.label>>. Current page: <<this.current>>"

attributes.name: aria-label
attributes.description: With this property you can overwrite aria-label.

attributes.name: firstLabel
attributes.description: This property is used to generate the name of the first button

attributes.name: previousLabel
attributes.description: This property is used to generate the name of the previous button

attributes.name: nextLabel
attributes.description: This property is used to generate the name of the next button

attributes.name: lastLabel
attributes.description: This property is used to generate the name of the last button

attributes.name: total
attributes.description: Set the amount of pages to navigate.

properties.name: label
properties.description: This property is used to generate a proper `aria-label`. It will be announced by screen reader as: "<<this.label>>. Current page: <<this.current>>"

properties.name: ariaLabel
properties.description: With this property you can overwrite aria-label.

properties.name: firstLabel
properties.description: This property is used to generate the name of the first button

properties.name: previousLabel
properties.description: This property is used to generate the name of the previous button

properties.name: nextLabel
properties.description: This property is used to generate the name of the next button

properties.name: lastLabel
properties.description: This property is used to generate the name of the last button

properties.name: total
properties.description: Set the amount of pages to navigate.

events.name: change
events.description: When clicked on the page button fires change event
